verses.text: الٓمٓصٓ
verses.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem, Sad
verses.translation_pt: Alif, Lam, Mim, Sad.

verses.text: كِتَٰبٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيۡكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِي صَدۡرِكَ حَرَجٞ مِّنۡهُ لِتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muhammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom - that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers
verses.translation_pt: Este livro foi revelado a você, Maomé. Não se preocupe com ele. Use-o para alertar a todos e lembrar os fiéis.

verses.text: ٱتَّبِعُواْ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيۡكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُواْ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوۡلِيَآءَۗ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember
verses.translation_pt: Sigam o que Deus lhes revelou. Não sigam outros protetores. Vocês se lembram pouco disso.

verses.text: وَكَم مِّن قَرۡيَةٍ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأۡسُنَا بَيَٰتًا أَوۡ هُمۡ قَآئِلُونَ
verses.translation: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon
verses.translation_pt: Quantas cidades destruímos! Nosso castigo veio de noite, ou quando descansavam.

verses.text: فَمَا كَانَ دَعۡوَىٰهُمۡ إِذۡ جَآءَهُم بَأۡسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers
verses.translation_pt: Quando o castigo de Deus chegou, só disseram: "Fomos injustos".

verses.text: فَلَنَسۡـَٔلَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أُرۡسِلَ إِلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَنَسۡـَٔلَنَّ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: Then We will surely question those to whom [a message] was sent, and We will surely question the messengers
verses.translation_pt: Perguntaremos aos que receberam a mensagem e aos mensageiros.

verses.text: فَلَنَقُصَّنَّ عَلَيۡهِم بِعِلۡمٖۖ وَمَا كُنَّا غَآئِبِينَ
verses.translation: Then We will surely relate [their deeds] to them with knowledge, and We were not [at all] absent
verses.translation_pt: Contaremos a eles com certeza, e não estávamos ausentes.

verses.text: وَٱلۡوَزۡنُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ ٱلۡحَقُّۚ فَمَن ثَقُلَتۡ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
verses.translation: And the weighing [of deeds] that Day will be the truth. So those whose scales are heavy - it is they who will be the successful
verses.translation_pt: Naquele dia, a justiça será perfeita. Quem tiver boas ações pesadas será bem-sucedido.

verses.text: وَمَنۡ خَفَّتۡ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓاْ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا يَظۡلِمُونَ
verses.translation: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses
verses.translation_pt: Quem tiver pouca recompensa, perderá a própria vida por ter sido injusto com os sinais de Deus.

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ مَكَّنَّـٰكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَجَعَلۡنَا لَكُمۡ فِيهَا مَعَٰيِشَۗ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.translation: And We have certainly established you upon the earth and made for you therein ways of livelihood. Little are you grateful
verses.translation_pt: Deus os estabeleceu na terra e lhes deu meios de viver. Mas vocês são pouco gratos.

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَٰكُمۡ ثُمَّ صَوَّرۡنَٰكُمۡ ثُمَّ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسۡجُدُواْ لِأٓدَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓاْ إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ لَمۡ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
verses.translation: And We have certainly created you, [O Mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated
verses.translation_pt: Nós os criamos e lhes demos forma. Então dissemos aos anjos: "Adorem Adão!". Todos o adoraram, menos Iblis, que se recusou.

verses.text: قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسۡجُدَ إِذۡ أَمَرۡتُكَۖ قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهُ خَلَقۡتَنِي مِن نَّارٖ وَخَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن طِينٖ
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "What prevented you from prostrating when I commanded you?" [Satan] said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay
verses.translation_pt:
Deus perguntou: “Por que não se curvou quando eu mandei?”
Ele respondeu: “Eu sou melhor que ele.
Você me criou do fogo e a ele, do barro.”

verses.text: قَالَ فَٱهۡبِطۡ مِنۡهَا فَمَا يَكُونُ لَكَ أَن تَتَكَبَّرَ فِيهَا فَٱخۡرُجۡ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰغِرِينَ
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "Descend from Paradise, for it is not for you to be arrogant therein. So get out; indeed, you are of the debased
verses.translation_pt: Disse Deus: "Saia do paraíso. Você não deve se orgulhar aqui. Vá embora, você é desprezível."

verses.text: قَالَ أَنظِرۡنِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.translation: [Satan] said, "Reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected
verses.translation_pt: Deixe-me viver até o Dia do Juízo.

verses.text: قَالَ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِينَ
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "Indeed, you are of those reprieved
verses.translation_pt: Deus disse: "Você está entre os que receberão um prazo."

verses.text: قَالَ فَبِمَآ أَغۡوَيۡتَنِي لَأَقۡعُدَنَّ لَهُمۡ صِرَٰطَكَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمَ
verses.translation: [Satan] said, "Because You have put me in error, I will surely sit in wait for them on Your straight path
verses.translation_pt: Disse: "Como me enganaste, vou esperar por eles no teu caminho."

verses.text: ثُمَّ لَأٓتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيۡنِ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِمۡ وَعَنۡ أَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمۡۖ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ شَٰكِرِينَ
verses.translation: Then I will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left, and You will not find most of them grateful [to You]
verses.translation_pt: Então os atacarei por todos os lados. Mas poucos serão gratos a Deus.

verses.text: قَالَ ٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا مَذۡءُومٗا مَّدۡحُورٗاۖ لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "Get out of Paradise, reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together
verses.translation_pt: Saia daqui, humilhado e rejeitado. Aquele que os seguir, eu encherei o inferno com todos vocês.

verses.text: وَيَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسۡكُنۡ أَنتَ وَزَوۡجُكَ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ فَكُلَا مِنۡ حَيۡثُ شِئۡتُمَا وَلَا تَقۡرَبَا هَٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers
verses.translation_pt: Adão, você e sua esposa podem morar no paraíso. Comam o que quiserem, mas não cheguem perto desta árvore.

verses.text: فَوَسۡوَسَ لَهُمَا ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ لِيُبۡدِيَ لَهُمَا مَا وُۥرِيَ عَنۡهُمَا مِن سَوۡءَٰتِهِمَا وَقَالَ مَا نَهَىٰكُمَا رَبُّكُمَا عَنۡ هَٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ إِلَّآ أَن تَكُونَا مَلَكَيۡنِ أَوۡ تَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلۡخَٰلِدِينَ
verses.translation: But Satan whispered to them to make apparent to them that which was concealed from them of their private parts. He said, "Your Lord did not forbid you this tree except that you become angels or become of the immortal
verses.translation_pt: Então o diabo sussurrou a eles, mostrando o que escondiam de seus corpos. E disse: "Deus não proibiu esta árvore, a não ser para que vocês se tornem anjos ou vivam para sempre."

verses.text: وَقَاسَمَهُمَآ إِنِّي لَكُمَا لَمِنَ ٱلنَّـٰصِحِينَ
verses.translation: And he swore [by Allah] to them, "Indeed, I am to you from among the sincere advisors
verses.translation_pt: E ele jurou a ambos: "Eu sou um conselheiro sincero."

verses.text: فَدَلَّىٰهُمَا بِغُرُورٖۚ فَلَمَّا ذَاقَا ٱلشَّجَرَةَ بَدَتۡ لَهُمَا سَوۡءَٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخۡصِفَانِ عَلَيۡهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَنَادَىٰهُمَا رَبُّهُمَآ أَلَمۡ أَنۡهَكُمَا عَن تِلۡكُمَا ٱلشَّجَرَةِ وَأَقُل لَّكُمَآ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَ لَكُمَا عَدُوّٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.translation: So he made them fall, through deception. And when they tasted of the tree, their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten together over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And their Lord called to them, "Did I not forbid you from that tree and tell you that Satan is to you a clear enemy
verses.translation_pt: Então ele os enganou e os fez cair. Quando comeram do fruto, viram sua nudez e cobriram-se com folhas. O Senhor os chamou: “Não lhes proibi essa árvore? E não lhes disse que Satanás é um inimigo claro?”

verses.text: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمۡنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمۡ تَغۡفِرۡ لَنَا وَتَرۡحَمۡنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡخَٰسِرِينَ
verses.translation: They said, "Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers
verses.translation_pt: Dissemos: Senhor, fizemos mal a nós mesmos. Se não nos perdoar e ter compaixão, estaremos perdidos.

verses.text: قَالَ ٱهۡبِطُواْ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ عَدُوّٞۖ وَلَكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مُسۡتَقَرّٞ وَمَتَٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٖ
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "Descend, being to one another enemies. And for you on the earth is a place of settlement and enjoyment for a time
verses.translation_pt:
Deus disse: Desçam e sejam inimigos uns dos outros.
Na terra vocês terão um lugar para viver e aproveitar por um tempo.

verses.text: قَالَ فِيهَا تَحۡيَوۡنَ وَفِيهَا تَمُوتُونَ وَمِنۡهَا تُخۡرَجُونَ
verses.translation: He said, "Therein you will live, and therein you will die, and from it you will be brought forth
verses.translation_pt:
Nela vocês viverão e nela morrerão.
De lá vocês sairão.

verses.text: يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ قَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمۡ لِبَاسٗا يُوَٰرِي سَوۡءَٰتِكُمۡ وَرِيشٗاۖ وَلِبَاسُ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرٞۚ ذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ ءَايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: O children of Adam, We have bestowed upon you clothing to conceal your private parts and as adornment. But the clothing of righteousness - that is best. That is from the signs of Allah that perhaps they will remember
verses.translation_pt: Filhos de Adão, demos roupas para cobrir o corpo e enfeitar. Mas a melhor roupa é a que mostra que vocês temem a Deus. Isso é um sinal de Deus, para que vocês se lembrem.

verses.text: يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ لَا يَفۡتِنَنَّكُمُ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ كَمَآ أَخۡرَجَ أَبَوَيۡكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ يَنزِعُ عَنۡهُمَا لِبَاسَهُمَا لِيُرِيَهُمَا سَوۡءَٰتِهِمَآۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَرَىٰكُمۡ هُوَ وَقَبِيلُهُۥ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا تَرَوۡنَهُمۡۗ إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَا ٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ أَوۡلِيَآءَ لِلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: O children of Adam, let not Satan tempt you as he removed your parents from Paradise, stripping them of their clothing to show them their private parts. Indeed, he sees you, he and his tribe, from where you do not see them. Indeed, We have made the devils allies to those who do not believe
verses.translation_pt: Filhos de Adão, não deixem o Diabo enganá-los, como ele tirou seus pais do Paraíso, mostrando sua vergonha. Ele e seus seguidores os observam, mesmo que vocês não os vejam. Nós fizemos os demônios aliados de quem não crê.

verses.text: وَإِذَا فَعَلُواْ فَٰحِشَةٗ قَالُواْ وَجَدۡنَا عَلَيۡهَآ ءَابَآءَنَا وَٱللَّهُ أَمَرَنَا بِهَاۗ قُلۡ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَأۡمُرُ بِٱلۡفَحۡشَآءِۖ أَتَقُولُونَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: And when they commit an immorality, they say, "We found our fathers doing it, and Allah has ordered us to do it." Say, "Indeed, Allah does not order immorality. Do you say about Allah that which you do not know
verses.translation_pt: Quando fazem algo errado, dizem: "Nossos pais também faziam isso, e Deus nos mandou". Responda: "Deus não manda fazer o mal. Vocês falam mentiras sobre Deus".

verses.text: قُلۡ أَمَرَ رَبِّي بِٱلۡقِسۡطِۖ وَأَقِيمُواْ وُجُوهَكُمۡ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسۡجِدٖ وَٱدۡعُوهُ مُخۡلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَۚ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمۡ تَعُودُونَ
verses.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "My Lord has ordered justice and that you maintain yourselves [in worship of Him] at every place [or time] of prostration, and invoke Him, sincere to Him in religion." Just as He originated you, you will return [to life]
verses.translation_pt: Diga: Meu Senhor ordena justiça. Adorem a Deus em cada lugar de oração, com sinceridade. Como ele os criou, a ele vocês voltarão.

verses.text: فَرِيقًا هَدَىٰ وَفَرِيقًا حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلضَّلَٰلَةُۚ إِنَّهُمُ ٱتَّخَذُواْ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ أَوۡلِيَآءَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَحۡسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهۡتَدُونَ
verses.translation: A group [of you] He guided, and a group deserved [to be in] error. Indeed, they had taken the devils as allies instead of Allah while they thought that they were guided
verses.translation_pt: Deus guiou alguns e outros mereceram se perder. Eles preferiram os demônios a Deus e pensam que estão no caminho certo.

verses.text: ۞يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ خُذُواْ زِينَتَكُمۡ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسۡجِدٖ وَكُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ وَلَا تُسۡرِفُوٓاْۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ
verses.translation: O children of Adam, take your adornment at every masjid, and eat and drink, but be not excessive. Indeed, He likes not those who commit excess
verses.translation_pt: Filhos de Adão, vistam-se bem para ir à mesquita. Comam, bebam, mas não exagerem. Deus não gosta de quem gasta demais.

verses.text: قُلۡ مَنۡ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِيٓ أَخۡرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ وَٱلطَّيِّبَٰتِ مِنَ ٱلرِّزۡقِۚ قُلۡ هِيَ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا خَالِصَةٗ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِۗ كَذَٰلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لِقَوۡمٖ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Say, "Who has forbidden the adornment of Allah which He has produced for His servants and the good [lawful] things of provision?" Say, "They are for those who believe during the worldly life [but] exclusively for them on the Day of Resurrection." Thus do We detail the verses for a people who know
verses.translation_pt: Pergunte: Quem proibiu os dons de Deus, que ele criou para seus servos, e as coisas boas que ele nos dá? Responda: São para quem crê nesta vida, e só para eles no Dia Final. Assim, Deus explica suas mensagens para quem sabe.

verses.text: قُلۡ إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ رَبِّيَ ٱلۡفَوَٰحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنۡهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ وَٱلۡإِثۡمَ وَٱلۡبَغۡيَ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَأَن تُشۡرِكُواْ بِٱللَّهِ مَا لَمۡ يُنَزِّلۡ بِهِۦ سُلۡطَٰنٗا وَأَن تَقُولُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Say, "My Lord has only forbidden immoralities - what is apparent of them and what is concealed - and sin, and oppression without right, and that you associate with Allah that for which He has not sent down authority, and that you say about Allah that which you do not know
verses.translation_pt: Diga: Meu Senhor proíbe apenas o que é vergonhoso, tanto o aberto quanto o secreto, e o pecado, a injustiça e a opressão. Também proíbe adorar a Deus com o que ele não permitiu e inventar mentiras sobre Deus.

verses.text: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٞۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمۡ لَا يَسۡتَأۡخِرُونَ سَاعَةٗ وَلَا يَسۡتَقۡدِمُونَ
verses.translation: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it]
verses.translation_pt: Cada povo tem um tempo certo. Quando esse tempo chegar, não podem adiantá-lo nem atrasá-lo.

verses.text: يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ إِمَّا يَأۡتِيَنَّكُمۡ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمۡ يَقُصُّونَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِي فَمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰ وَأَصۡلَحَ فَلَا خَوۡفٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحۡزَنُونَ
verses.translation: O children of Adam, if there come to you messengers from among you relating to you My verses, then whoever fears Allah and reforms - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve
verses.translation_pt: Filhos de Adão, se mensageiros de vocês vierem com os sinais de Deus, quem o temer e se arrepender não terá medo nem ficará triste.

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ عَنۡهَآ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِۖ هُمۡ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.translation: But the ones who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally
verses.translation_pt: Quem rejeitou nossos sinais e se orgulhou disso, terá o fogo como lar. Lá ficarão para sempre.

verses.text: فَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفۡتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا أَوۡ كَذَّبَ بِـَٔايَٰتِهِۦٓۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ يَنَالُهُمۡ نَصِيبُهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُنَا يَتَوَفَّوۡنَهُمۡ قَالُوٓاْ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِۖ قَالُواْ ضَلُّواْ عَنَّا وَشَهِدُواْ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمۡ أَنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ كَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah a lie or denies His verses? Those will attain their portion of the decree until when Our messengers come to them to take them in death, they will say, "Where are those you used to invoke besides Allah?" They will say, "They have departed from us," and will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers
verses.translation_pt: Quem é mais injusto do que inventar mentiras sobre Deus ou rejeitar seus sinais? Esses receberão o que merecem do livro. Quando nossos mensageiros vierem para levá-los, perguntarão onde estão os deuses que adoravam. Eles dirão que se afastaram e testemunharão contra si mesmos que não acreditaram.

verses.text: قَالَ ٱدۡخُلُواْ فِيٓ أُمَمٖ قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِن قَبۡلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ وَٱلۡإِنسِ فِي ٱلنَّارِۖ كُلَّمَا دَخَلَتۡ أُمَّةٞ لَّعَنَتۡ أُخۡتَهَاۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا ٱدَّارَكُواْ فِيهَا جَمِيعٗا قَالَتۡ أُخۡرَىٰهُمۡ لِأُولَىٰهُمۡ رَبَّنَا هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ أَضَلُّونَا فَـَٔاتِهِمۡ عَذَابٗا ضِعۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِۖ قَالَ لِكُلّٖ ضِعۡفٞ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: [Allah] will say, "Enter among nations which had passed on before you of jinn and mankind into the Fire." Every time a nation enters, it will curse its sister until, when they have all overtaken one another therein, the last of them will say about the first of them "Our Lord, these had misled us, so give them a double punishment of the Fire. He will say, "For each is double, but you do not know
verses.translation_pt: Deus dirá: Entrem com os povos que já passaram, tanto gênios como homens, no fogo. Cada grupo, ao entrar, amaldiçoará o outro. Quando todos estiverem lá, o último dirá aos primeiros: Senhor, eles nos enganaram. Dê a eles o dobro do castigo. Deus responderá: Para cada um, o dobro, mas vocês não sabem.

verses.text: وَقَالَتۡ أُولَىٰهُمۡ لِأُخۡرَىٰهُمۡ فَمَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ عَلَيۡنَا مِن فَضۡلٖ فَذُوقُواْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.translation: And the first of them will say to the last of them, "Then you had not any favor over us, so taste the punishment for what you used to earn
verses.translation_pt:
Os primeiros dirão aos últimos: “Não tivemos vantagem sobre vocês.
Provem o castigo por causa do que vocês fizeram.”

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ عَنۡهَا لَا تُفَتَّحُ لَهُمۡ أَبۡوَٰبُ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَلَا يَدۡخُلُونَ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ حَتَّىٰ يَلِجَ ٱلۡجَمَلُ فِي سَمِّ ٱلۡخِيَاطِۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: Indeed, those who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - the gates of Heaven will not be opened for them, nor will they enter Paradise until a camel enters into the eye of a needle. And thus do We recompense the criminals
verses.translation_pt: Quem rejeita os sinais de Deus e se orgulha disso não entrará no paraíso. É como tentar passar um camelo pela agulha. Assim punimos os que fazem o mal.

verses.text: لَهُم مِّن جَهَنَّمَ مِهَادٞ وَمِن فَوۡقِهِمۡ غَوَاشٖۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: They will have from Hell a bed and over them coverings [of fire]. And thus do We recompense the wrongdoers
verses.translation_pt: Eles terão o inferno por leito e o fogo por cobertor. Assim Deus paga os injustos.

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفۡسًا إِلَّا وُسۡعَهَآ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ هُمۡ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.translation: But those who believed and did righteous deeds - We charge no soul except [within] its capacity. Those are the companions of Paradise; they will abide therein eternally
verses.translation_pt:
A quem crê e faz o bem, não exigimos mais do que pode.
Esses são os que entrarão no Paraíso e lá viverão para sempre.

verses.text: وَنَزَعۡنَا مَا فِي صُدُورِهِم مِّنۡ غِلّٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهِمُ ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۖ وَقَالُواْ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي هَدَىٰنَا لِهَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهۡتَدِيَ لَوۡلَآ أَنۡ هَدَىٰنَا ٱللَّهُۖ لَقَدۡ جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُ رَبِّنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ وَنُودُوٓاْ أَن تِلۡكُمُ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ أُورِثۡتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: And We will have removed whatever is within their breasts of resentment, [while] flowing beneath them are rivers. And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has guided us to this; and we would never have been guided if Allah had not guided us. Certainly the messengers of our Lord had come with the truth." And they will be called, "This is Paradise, which you have been made to inherit for what you used to do
verses.translation_pt: Retiraremos todo o rancor de seus corações. Rios correrão sob eles. Dirão: “Louvado seja Deus, que nos guiou a isto! Não teríamos sido guiados sem Deus. Os mensageiros de nosso Senhor trouxeram a verdade”. E ouvirão: “Este é o Paraíso, que vocês receberam por suas boas ações”.

verses.text: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ أَن قَدۡ وَجَدۡنَا مَا وَعَدَنَا رَبُّنَا حَقّٗا فَهَلۡ وَجَدتُّم مَّا وَعَدَ رَبُّكُمۡ حَقّٗاۖ قَالُواْ نَعَمۡۚ فَأَذَّنَ مُؤَذِّنُۢ بَيۡنَهُمۡ أَن لَّعۡنَةُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَى ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And the companions of Paradise will call out to the companions of the Fire, "We have already found what our Lord promised us to be true. Have you found what your Lord promised to be true?" They will say, "Yes." Then an announcer will announce among them, "The curse of Allah shall be upon the wrongdoers
verses.translation_pt: Os que estão no Paraíso chamarão os que estão no Fogo: “Deus cumpriu o que nos prometeu. Vocês também encontraram o que seu Senhor prometeu?” Eles dirão: “Sim”. Então, um anunciador dirá entre eles: “Que Deus amaldiçoe os injustos!”

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ يَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَبۡغُونَهَا عِوَجٗا وَهُم بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ كَٰفِرُونَ
verses.translation: Who averted [people] from the way of Allah and sought to make it [seem] deviant while they were, concerning the Hereafter, disbelievers
verses.translation_pt: Eles impedem o caminho de Deus e o querem torto. Não creem na vida futura.

verses.text: وَبَيۡنَهُمَا حِجَابٞۚ وَعَلَى ٱلۡأَعۡرَافِ رِجَالٞ يَعۡرِفُونَ كُلَّۢا بِسِيمَىٰهُمۡۚ وَنَادَوۡاْ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ أَن سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡۚ لَمۡ يَدۡخُلُوهَا وَهُمۡ يَطۡمَعُونَ
verses.translation: And between them will be a partition, and on [its] elevations are men who recognize all by their mark. And they call out to the companions of Paradise, "Peace be upon you." They have not [yet] entered it, but they long intensely
verses.translation_pt: Entre eles há uma barreira. E sobre o Paraíso, homens que conhecem todos pelas suas marcas. Eles saúdam os do Paraíso: “Que a paz esteja com vocês!” Eles não entraram, mas esperam.

verses.text: ۞وَإِذَا صُرِفَتۡ أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ تِلۡقَآءَ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ قَالُواْ رَبَّنَا لَا تَجۡعَلۡنَا مَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And when their eyes are turned toward the companions of the Fire, they say, "Our Lord, do not place us with the wrongdoing people
verses.translation_pt: Quando olham para os que vão para o fogo, dizem: Deus, não nos coloque com o povo injusto.

verses.text: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَعۡرَافِ رِجَالٗا يَعۡرِفُونَهُم بِسِيمَىٰهُمۡ قَالُواْ مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنكُمۡ جَمۡعُكُمۡ وَمَا كُنتُمۡ تَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ
verses.translation: And the companions of the Elevations will call to men [within Hell] whom they recognize by their mark, saying, "Of no avail to you was your gathering and [the fact] that you were arrogant
verses.translation_pt: Os que estão no Paraíso chamarão homens que conhecem pelas marcas. Dirão: “De que serviu o que vocês juntaram e se orgulharam?”

verses.text: أَهَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ ٱلَّذِينَ أَقۡسَمۡتُمۡ لَا يَنَالُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِرَحۡمَةٍۚ ٱدۡخُلُواْ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ لَا خَوۡفٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَلَآ أَنتُمۡ تَحۡزَنُونَ
verses.translation: [Allah will say], "Are these the ones whom you [inhabitants of Hell] swore that Allah would never offer them mercy? Enter Paradise, [O People of the Elevations]. No fear will there be concerning you, nor will you grieve
verses.translation_pt: Será que são estes a quem juraram que Deus não teria misericórdia? Entrem no Paraíso, sem medo e sem tristeza.

verses.text: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ أَنۡ أَفِيضُواْ عَلَيۡنَا مِنَ ٱلۡمَآءِ أَوۡ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُۚ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ حَرَّمَهُمَا عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: And the companions of the Fire will call to the companions of Paradise, "Pour upon us some water or from whatever Allah has provided you." They will say, "Indeed, Allah has forbidden them both to the disbelievers
verses.translation_pt: Os do fogo gritarão aos do paraíso: "Joguem um pouco de água em nós, ou do que Deus lhes deu". Eles dirão: "Deus proibiu isso aos que não creram".

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُواْ دِينَهُمۡ لَهۡوٗا وَلَعِبٗا وَغَرَّتۡهُمُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۚ فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ نَنسَىٰهُمۡ كَمَا نَسُواْ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِهِمۡ هَٰذَا وَمَا كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا يَجۡحَدُونَ
verses.translation: Who took their religion as distraction and amusement and whom the worldly life deluded." So today We will forget them just as they forgot the meeting of this Day of theirs and for having rejected Our verses
verses.translation_pt: Eles fizeram da religião um jogo e uma diversão. A vida terrena os enganou. Hoje, nós os esquecemos, como eles esqueceram este dia e negaram nossos sinais.

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ جِئۡنَٰهُم بِكِتَٰبٖ فَصَّلۡنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ عِلۡمٍ هُدٗى وَرَحۡمَةٗ لِّقَوۡمٖ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: And We had certainly brought them a Book which We detailed by knowledge - as guidance and mercy to a people who believe
verses.translation_pt:
Trouxemos a eles um livro detalhado,
com conhecimento, para guiar e ser
misericórdia para quem crê.

verses.text: هَلۡ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا تَأۡوِيلَهُۥۚ يَوۡمَ يَأۡتِي تَأۡوِيلُهُۥ يَقُولُ ٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوهُ مِن قَبۡلُ قَدۡ جَآءَتۡ رُسُلُ رَبِّنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَهَل لَّنَا مِن شُفَعَآءَ فَيَشۡفَعُواْ لَنَآ أَوۡ نُرَدُّ فَنَعۡمَلَ غَيۡرَ ٱلَّذِي كُنَّا نَعۡمَلُۚ قَدۡ خَسِرُوٓاْ أَنفُسَهُمۡ وَضَلَّ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يَفۡتَرُونَ
verses.translation: Do they await except its result? The Day its result comes those who had ignored it before will say, "The messengers of our Lord had come with the truth, so are there [now] any intercessors to intercede for us or could we be sent back to do other than we used to do?" They will have lost themselves, and lost from them is what they used to invent
verses.translation_pt: Será que eles esperam outra coisa além do momento final? No dia em que isso acontecer, quem se esqueceu de Deus antes dirá: “Os mensageiros do nosso Senhor trouxeram a verdade. Teremos alguém para nos ajudar ou poderemos voltar para fazer diferente?” Eles se perderam e tudo o que inventaram sumiu.

verses.text: إِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٖ ثُمَّ ٱسۡتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡعَرۡشِۖ يُغۡشِي ٱلَّيۡلَ ٱلنَّهَارَ يَطۡلُبُهُۥ حَثِيثٗا وَٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَ وَٱلنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرَٰتِۭ بِأَمۡرِهِۦٓۗ أَلَا لَهُ ٱلۡخَلۡقُ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُۗ تَبَارَكَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: Indeed, your Lord is Allah, who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. He covers the night with the day, [another night] chasing it rapidly; and [He created] the sun, the moon, and the stars, subjected by His command. Unquestionably, His is the creation and the command; blessed is Allah, Lord of the worlds
verses.translation_pt: Deus é o seu Senhor, que criou os céus e a terra em seis dias. Depois, estabeleceu-se no trono. Ele cobre a noite com o dia, e o sol, a lua e as estrelas estão sob seu poder. A criação e tudo o que acontece pertencem a Deus. Louvado seja Deus, Senhor do universo.

verses.text: ٱدۡعُواْ رَبَّكُمۡ تَضَرُّعٗا وَخُفۡيَةًۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُعۡتَدِينَ
verses.translation: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors
verses.translation_pt:
Peçam ajuda ao seu Senhor com humildade.
Deus não gosta de quem exagera.

verses.text: وَلَا تُفۡسِدُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بَعۡدَ إِصۡلَٰحِهَا وَٱدۡعُوهُ خَوۡفٗا وَطَمَعًاۚ إِنَّ رَحۡمَتَ ٱللَّهِ قَرِيبٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: And cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation. And invoke Him in fear and aspiration. Indeed, the mercy of Allah is near to the doers of good
verses.translation_pt: Não causem desordem na terra depois que ela foi arrumada. E orem a Deus com medo e esperança. A misericórdia de Deus está perto de quem faz o bem.

verses.text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ بُشۡرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَقَلَّتۡ سَحَابٗا ثِقَالٗا سُقۡنَٰهُ لِبَلَدٖ مَّيِّتٖ فَأَنزَلۡنَا بِهِ ٱلۡمَآءَ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy until, when they have carried heavy rainclouds, We drive them to a dead land and We send down rain therein and bring forth thereby [some] of all the fruits. Thus will We bring forth the dead; perhaps you may be reminded
verses.translation_pt: Ele envia os ventos como boas notícias do seu favor. Eles carregam nuvens pesadas e as levam a terras secas. Daí vem a chuva, que faz crescer todo tipo de fruta. Assim, nós ressuscitamos os mortos para que vocês se lembrem.

verses.text: وَٱلۡبَلَدُ ٱلطَّيِّبُ يَخۡرُجُ نَبَاتُهُۥ بِإِذۡنِ رَبِّهِۦۖ وَٱلَّذِي خَبُثَ لَا يَخۡرُجُ إِلَّا نَكِدٗاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نُصَرِّفُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لِقَوۡمٖ يَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.translation: And the good land - its vegetation emerges by permission of its Lord; but that which is bad - nothing emerges except sparsely, with difficulty. Thus do We diversify the signs for a people who are grateful
verses.translation_pt: A terra boa dá plantas com a permissão de Deus. A terra ruim só dá espinhos e ervas daninhas. Assim, Deus explica as coisas para quem é grato.

verses.text: لَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنۡ إِلَٰهٍ غَيۡرُهُۥٓ إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
verses.translation: We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a tremendous Day
verses.translation_pt: Enviamos Noé ao seu povo e ele disse: "Adorem a Deus! Não há outro Deus para vocês. Temo o castigo de um dia terrível."

verses.text: قَالَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ مِن قَوۡمِهِۦٓ إِنَّا لَنَرَىٰكَ فِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.translation: Said the eminent among his people, "Indeed, we see you in clear error
verses.translation_pt: Os líderes do seu povo disseram: "Vemos que você está muito enganado."

verses.text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ لَيۡسَ بِي ضَلَٰلَةٞ وَلَٰكِنِّي رَسُولٞ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: [Noah] said, "O my people, there is not error in me, but I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds
verses.translation_pt: Povo, não estou errado, sou mensageiro de Deus, Senhor do universo.

verses.text: أُبَلِّغُكُمۡ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّي وَأَنصَحُ لَكُمۡ وَأَعۡلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: I convey to you the messages of my Lord and advise you; and I know from Allah what you do not know
verses.translation_pt:
Eu lhes transmito as mensagens de Deus.
Os aconselho e sei de Deus o que vocês não sabem.

verses.text: أَوَعَجِبۡتُمۡ أَن جَآءَكُمۡ ذِكۡرٞ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٖ مِّنكُمۡ لِيُنذِرَكُمۡ وَلِتَتَّقُواْ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
verses.translation: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allah so you might receive mercy
verses.translation_pt: Vocês se espantam que Deus lhes envie um aviso por meio de um de vocês? Ele os adverte e quer que temam a Deus, para que recebam sua misericórdia.

verses.text: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ فِي ٱلۡفُلۡكِ وَأَغۡرَقۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمًا عَمِينَ
verses.translation: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people
verses.translation_pt: Mas o negaram. Então, salvamos Noé e quem estava com ele no barco. E afogamos quem rejeitou nossos sinais. Eles eram um povo cego.

verses.text: ۞وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمۡ هُودٗاۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنۡ إِلَٰهٍ غَيۡرُهُۥٓۚ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.translation: And to the 'Aad [We sent] their brother Hud. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. Then will you not fear Him
verses.translation_pt: Ao povo de Ad, enviamos o irmão deles, Hud. Ele disse: "Adorem a Deus! Não há outro Deus além dele. Não temem a Deus?"

verses.text: قَالَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن قَوۡمِهِۦٓ إِنَّا لَنَرَىٰكَ فِي سَفَاهَةٖ وَإِنَّا لَنَظُنُّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰذِبِينَ
verses.translation: Said the eminent ones who disbelieved among his people, "Indeed, we see you in foolishness, and indeed, we think you are of the liars
verses.translation_pt: Os líderes do seu povo que não creram disseram: "Vemos que você é tolo e pensamos que você mente."

verses.text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ لَيۡسَ بِي سَفَاهَةٞ وَلَٰكِنِّي رَسُولٞ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: [Hud] said, "O my people, there is not foolishness in me, but I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds
verses.translation_pt: Povo, não sou tolo, mas um mensageiro de Deus, o Senhor do universo.

verses.text: أُبَلِّغُكُمۡ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّي وَأَنَا۠ لَكُمۡ نَاصِحٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.translation: I convey to you the messages of my Lord, and I am to you a trustworthy adviser
verses.translation_pt:
Eu lhes transmito as mensagens de Deus.
Sou um conselheiro sincero para vocês.

verses.text: أَوَعَجِبۡتُمۡ أَن جَآءَكُمۡ ذِكۡرٞ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٖ مِّنكُمۡ لِيُنذِرَكُمۡۚ وَٱذۡكُرُوٓاْ إِذۡ جَعَلَكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ قَوۡمِ نُوحٖ وَزَادَكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡخَلۡقِ بَصۜۡطَةٗۖ فَٱذۡكُرُوٓاْ ءَالَآءَ ٱللَّهِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُفۡلِحُونَ
verses.translation: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you? And remember when He made you successors after the people of Noah and increased you in stature extensively. So remember the favors of Allah that you might succeed
verses.translation_pt: Vocês se espantam que Deus enviou um aviso por um homem como vocês? Lembrem-se: ele os fez líderes depois do povo de Noé e os abençoou. Agradeçam a Deus para terem sucesso.

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ أَجِئۡتَنَا لِنَعۡبُدَ ٱللَّهَ وَحۡدَهُۥ وَنَذَرَ مَا كَانَ يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا فَأۡتِنَا بِمَا تَعِدُنَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: They said, "Have you come to us that we should worship Allah alone and leave what our fathers have worshipped? Then bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the truthful
verses.translation_pt: Eles disseram: "Você veio para adorarmos só a Deus e deixarmos o que nossos pais adoravam? Traga o que você promete, se é verdadeiro."

verses.text: قَالَ قَدۡ وَقَعَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ رِجۡسٞ وَغَضَبٌۖ أَتُجَٰدِلُونَنِي فِيٓ أَسۡمَآءٖ سَمَّيۡتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمۡ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلۡطَٰنٖۚ فَٱنتَظِرُوٓاْ إِنِّي مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡمُنتَظِرِينَ
verses.translation: [Hud] said, "Already have defilement and anger fallen upon you from your Lord. Do you dispute with me concerning [mere] names you have named them, you and your fathers, for which Allah has not sent down any authority? Then wait; indeed, I am with you among those who wait
verses.translation_pt: Disse ele: “Já caiu sobre vocês a ira e o castigo de Deus. Vocês discutem comigo sobre nomes que inventaram, vocês e seus pais, sem que Deus permita isso. Esperem, pois eu também esperarei com vocês.”

verses.text: فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ بِرَحۡمَةٖ مِّنَّا وَقَطَعۡنَا دَابِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَاۖ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: So We saved him and those with him by mercy from Us. And We eliminated those who denied Our signs, and they were not [at all] believers
verses.translation_pt: Livramos ele e os que estavam com ele pela nossa misericórdia. Acabamos com os que rejeitaram nossos sinais e não creram.

verses.text: وَإِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمۡ صَٰلِحٗاۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنۡ إِلَٰهٍ غَيۡرُهُۥۖ قَدۡ جَآءَتۡكُم بَيِّنَةٞ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡۖ هَٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةُ ٱللَّهِ لَكُمۡ ءَايَةٗۖ فَذَرُوهَا تَأۡكُلۡ فِيٓ أَرۡضِ ٱللَّهِۖ وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٖ فَيَأۡخُذَكُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
verses.translation: And to the Thamud [We sent] their brother Salih. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. There has come to you clear evidence from your Lord. This is the she-camel of Allah [sent] to you as a sign. So leave her to eat within Allah 's land and do not touch her with harm, lest there seize you a painful punishment
verses.translation_pt: Ao povo de Samud, enviamos o irmão deles, Salih. Ele disse: “Adorem a Deus, pois não há outro Deus além dele. Deus lhes enviou um sinal claro: esta camela. Deixem-na comer na terra de Deus e não a machuquem, ou sofrerão um castigo terrível.”

verses.text: وَٱذۡكُرُوٓاْ إِذۡ جَعَلَكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ عَادٖ وَبَوَّأَكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ تَتَّخِذُونَ مِن سُهُولِهَا قُصُورٗا وَتَنۡحِتُونَ ٱلۡجِبَالَ بُيُوتٗاۖ فَٱذۡكُرُوٓاْ ءَالَآءَ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِينَ
verses.translation: And remember when He made you successors after the 'Aad and settled you in the land, [and] you take for yourselves palaces from its plains and carve from the mountains, homes. Then remember the favors of Allah and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption
verses.translation_pt: Lembrem-se quando Deus os fez herdeiros após o povo de Aad. Ele os estabeleceu na terra, para que construíssem casas nos campos e casas nas montanhas. Lembrem-se dos benefícios de Deus e não causem desordem na terra.

verses.text: قَالَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ مِن قَوۡمِهِۦ لِلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتُضۡعِفُواْ لِمَنۡ ءَامَنَ مِنۡهُمۡ أَتَعۡلَمُونَ أَنَّ صَٰلِحٗا مُّرۡسَلٞ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦۚ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرۡسِلَ بِهِۦ مُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: Said the eminent ones who were arrogant among his people to those who were oppressed - to those who believed among them, "Do you [actually] know that Salih is sent from his Lord?" They said, "Indeed we, in that with which he was sent, are believers
verses.translation_pt: Os líderes arrogantes disseram aos oprimidos, que creram: “Sabem que Salih foi enviado por Deus?” Eles responderam: “Sim, nós cremos no que ele trouxe.”

verses.text: قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرُوٓاْ إِنَّا بِٱلَّذِيٓ ءَامَنتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
verses.translation: Said those who were arrogant, "Indeed we, in that which you have believed, are disbelievers
verses.translation_pt: Os orgulhosos disseram: "Não acreditamos no que vocês crêem."

verses.text: فَعَقَرُواْ ٱلنَّاقَةَ وَعَتَوۡاْ عَنۡ أَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَقَالُواْ يَٰصَٰلِحُ ٱئۡتِنَا بِمَا تَعِدُنَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: So they hamstrung the she-camel and were insolent toward the command of their Lord and said, "O Salih, bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the messengers
verses.translation_pt: Mataram a camela e desobedeceram a Deus. Disseram: "Salih, traga o que nos prometeu, se você é um mensageiro."

verses.text: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلرَّجۡفَةُ فَأَصۡبَحُواْ فِي دَارِهِمۡ جَٰثِمِينَ
verses.translation: So the earthquake seized them, and they became within their home [corpses] fallen prone
verses.translation_pt: Um tremor os pegou e eles ficaram caídos em suas casas.

verses.text: فَتَوَلَّىٰ عَنۡهُمۡ وَقَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ لَقَدۡ أَبۡلَغۡتُكُمۡ رِسَالَةَ رَبِّي وَنَصَحۡتُ لَكُمۡ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُحِبُّونَ ٱلنَّـٰصِحِينَ
verses.translation: And he turned away from them and said, "O my people, I had certainly conveyed to you the message of my Lord and advised you, but you do not like advisors
verses.translation_pt: Ele se afastou e disse: Povo, entreguei a mensagem de Deus e vos aconselhei. Mas vocês não gostam de quem vos aconselha.

verses.text: وَلُوطًا إِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَتَأۡتُونَ ٱلۡفَٰحِشَةَ مَا سَبَقَكُم بِهَا مِنۡ أَحَدٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: And [We had sent] Lot when he said to his people, "Do you commit such immorality as no one has preceded you with from among the worlds
verses.translation_pt: Ló disse ao seu povo: “Vocês fazem coisas terríveis que ninguém fez antes.”

verses.text: إِنَّكُمۡ لَتَأۡتُونَ ٱلرِّجَالَ شَهۡوَةٗ مِّن دُونِ ٱلنِّسَآءِۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٞ مُّسۡرِفُونَ
verses.translation: Indeed, you approach men with desire, instead of women. Rather, you are a transgressing people
verses.translation_pt: Vocês se entregam aos homens no lugar das mulheres. Vocês são um povo exagerado.

verses.text: وَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوۡمِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓاْ أَخۡرِجُوهُم مِّن قَرۡيَتِكُمۡۖ إِنَّهُمۡ أُنَاسٞ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ
verses.translation: But the answer of his people was only that they said, "Evict them from your city! Indeed, they are men who keep themselves pure
verses.translation_pt: Mas seu povo só disse: “Expulsem-nos da cidade! São pessoas que se purificam.”

verses.text: فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَهُۥ كَانَتۡ مِنَ ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.translation: So We saved him and his family, except for his wife; she was of those who remained [with the evildoers]
verses.translation_pt:
Livramos ele e sua família, menos sua esposa.
Ela ficou com os que fizeram o mal.

verses.text: وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم مَّطَرٗاۖ فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones]. Then see how was the end of the criminals
verses.translation_pt:
Enviamos sobre eles uma chuva terrível.
Veja como foi o fim dos malfeitores.

verses.text: وَإِلَىٰ مَدۡيَنَ أَخَاهُمۡ شُعَيۡبٗاۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنۡ إِلَٰهٍ غَيۡرُهُۥۖ قَدۡ جَآءَتۡكُم بَيِّنَةٞ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡۖ فَأَوۡفُواْ ٱلۡكَيۡلَ وَٱلۡمِيزَانَ وَلَا تَبۡخَسُواْ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشۡيَآءَهُمۡ وَلَا تُفۡسِدُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بَعۡدَ إِصۡلَٰحِهَاۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ خَيۡرٞ لَّكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: And to [the people of] Madyan [We sent] their brother Shu'ayb. He said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him. There has come to you clear evidence from your Lord. So fulfill the measure and weight and do not deprive people of their due and cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation. That is better for you, if you should be believers
verses.translation_pt: Shuayb foi enviado ao povo de Madiã. Ele disse: “Adorem a Deus, pois não há outro Deus além dele. Deus lhes deu provas claras. Sejam justos nas medidas e nos pesos, e não enganem as pessoas. Não causem problemas na terra depois que ela foi consertada. Isso é melhor para vocês, se crerem.”

verses.text: وَلَا تَقۡعُدُواْ بِكُلِّ صِرَٰطٖ تُوعِدُونَ وَتَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ مَنۡ ءَامَنَ بِهِۦ وَتَبۡغُونَهَا عِوَجٗاۚ وَٱذۡكُرُوٓاْ إِذۡ كُنتُمۡ قَلِيلٗا فَكَثَّرَكُمۡۖ وَٱنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ
verses.translation: And do not sit on every path, threatening and averting from the way of Allah those who believe in Him, seeking to make it [seem] deviant. And remember when you were few and He increased you. And see how was the end of the corrupters
verses.translation_pt: Não fiquem à espreita para ameaçar e impedir os que creem em Deus. Não tentem desviar ninguém do caminho de Deus. Lembrem-se de quando eram poucos e Deus os multiplicou. Vejam o que aconteceu com os que agiram mal.

verses.text: وَإِن كَانَ طَآئِفَةٞ مِّنكُمۡ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱلَّذِيٓ أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ وَطَآئِفَةٞ لَّمۡ يُؤۡمِنُواْ فَٱصۡبِرُواْ حَتَّىٰ يَحۡكُمَ ٱللَّهُ بَيۡنَنَاۚ وَهُوَ خَيۡرُ ٱلۡحَٰكِمِينَ
verses.translation: And if there should be a group among you who has believed in that with which I have been sent and a group that has not believed, then be patient until Allah judges between us. And He is the best of judges
verses.translation_pt: Se alguns de vocês creram no que me foi enviado e outros não, sejam pacientes. Deus julgará entre nós. Ele é o melhor juiz.

verses.text: ۞قَالَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ مِن قَوۡمِهِۦ لَنُخۡرِجَنَّكَ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مَعَكَ مِن قَرۡيَتِنَآ أَوۡ لَتَعُودُنَّ فِي مِلَّتِنَاۚ قَالَ أَوَلَوۡ كُنَّا كَٰرِهِينَ
verses.translation: Said the eminent ones who were arrogant among his people, "We will surely evict you, O Shu'ayb, and those who have believed with you from our city, or you must return to our religion." He said, "Even if we were unwilling
verses.translation_pt: Os líderes arrogantes disseram a Seuib: “Vamos expulsar você e quem crê em você da nossa cidade. Ou voltem à nossa religião!” Ele respondeu: “Mesmo contra a nossa vontade?”

verses.text: قَدِ ٱفۡتَرَيۡنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا إِنۡ عُدۡنَا فِي مِلَّتِكُم بَعۡدَ إِذۡ نَجَّىٰنَا ٱللَّهُ مِنۡهَاۚ وَمَا يَكُونُ لَنَآ أَن نَّعُودَ فِيهَآ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّنَاۚ وَسِعَ رَبُّنَا كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عِلۡمًاۚ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ تَوَكَّلۡنَاۚ رَبَّنَا ٱفۡتَحۡ بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَ قَوۡمِنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَأَنتَ خَيۡرُ ٱلۡفَٰتِحِينَ
verses.translation: We would have invented against Allah a lie if we returned to your religion after Allah had saved us from it. And it is not for us to return to it except that Allah, our Lord, should will. Our Lord has encompassed all things in knowledge. Upon Allah we have relied. Our Lord, decide between us and our people in truth, and You are the best of those who give decision
verses.translation_pt: Teríamos inventado uma mentira sobre Deus se voltássemos à religião de vocês, depois que Deus nos salvou dela. Não podemos voltar, a menos que Deus, nosso Senhor, queira. Deus sabe de tudo. Confiaremos em Deus. Senhor, julgue entre nós e nosso povo com justiça, pois você é o melhor juiz.

verses.text: وَقَالَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن قَوۡمِهِۦ لَئِنِ ٱتَّبَعۡتُمۡ شُعَيۡبًا إِنَّكُمۡ إِذٗا لَّخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.translation: Said the eminent ones who disbelieved among his people, "If you should follow Shu'ayb, indeed, you would then be losers
verses.translation_pt: Os líderes do seu povo que não creram disseram: "Se seguirem Shu'aib, vocês só terão prejuízo".

verses.text: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلرَّجۡفَةُ فَأَصۡبَحُواْ فِي دَارِهِمۡ جَٰثِمِينَ
verses.translation: So the earthquake seized them, and they became within their home [corpses] fallen prone
verses.translation_pt: Um tremor os pegou e eles ficaram caídos em suas casas.

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ شُعَيۡبٗا كَأَن لَّمۡ يَغۡنَوۡاْ فِيهَاۚ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ شُعَيۡبٗا كَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡخَٰسِرِينَ
verses.translation: Those who denied Shu'ayb - it was as though they had never resided there. Those who denied Shu'ayb - it was they who were the losers
verses.translation_pt: Quem negou Seuáib, foi como se nunca tivesse vivido ali. Quem negou Seuáib, foram eles que perderam.

verses.text: فَتَوَلَّىٰ عَنۡهُمۡ وَقَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ لَقَدۡ أَبۡلَغۡتُكُمۡ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّي وَنَصَحۡتُ لَكُمۡۖ فَكَيۡفَ ءَاسَىٰ عَلَىٰ قَوۡمٖ كَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: And he turned away from them and said, "O my people, I had certainly conveyed to you the messages of my Lord and advised you, so how could I grieve for a disbelieving people
verses.translation_pt: Ele se afastou deles e disse: "Povo, entreguei as mensagens de Deus e os aconselhei. Como posso ficar triste por um povo que não crê?"

verses.text: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا فِي قَرۡيَةٖ مِّن نَّبِيٍّ إِلَّآ أَخَذۡنَآ أَهۡلَهَا بِٱلۡبَأۡسَآءِ وَٱلضَّرَّآءِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَضَّرَّعُونَ
verses.translation: And We sent to no city a prophet [who was denied] except that We seized its people with poverty and hardship that they might humble themselves [to Allah]
verses.translation_pt: Em cada cidade enviamos um profeta, e o povo sofreu pobreza e dor. Talvez assim se humilhem e busquem a Deus.

verses.text: ثُمَّ بَدَّلۡنَا مَكَانَ ٱلسَّيِّئَةِ ٱلۡحَسَنَةَ حَتَّىٰ عَفَواْ وَّقَالُواْ قَدۡ مَسَّ ءَابَآءَنَا ٱلضَّرَّآءُ وَٱلسَّرَّآءُ فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُم بَغۡتَةٗ وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.translation: Then We exchanged in place of the bad [condition], good, until they increased [and prospered] and said, "Our fathers [also] were touched with hardship and ease." So We seized them suddenly while they did not perceive
verses.translation_pt: Trocamos o mal pelo bem, até que prosperaram e disseram: "Nossos pais também sofreram e viveram bem". Mas os pegamos de surpresa, sem que percebessem.

verses.text: وَلَوۡ أَنَّ أَهۡلَ ٱلۡقُرَىٰٓ ءَامَنُواْ وَٱتَّقَوۡاْ لَفَتَحۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم بَرَكَٰتٖ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَٰكِن كَذَّبُواْ فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُم بِمَا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.translation: And if only the people of the cities had believed and feared Allah, We would have opened upon them blessings from the heaven and the earth; but they denied [the messengers], so We seized them for what they were earning
verses.translation_pt: Se os moradores tivessem crido e temido a Deus, teríamos abençoado a terra e o céu. Mas não creram, e os punimos por seus atos.

verses.text: أَفَأَمِنَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡقُرَىٰٓ أَن يَأۡتِيَهُم بَأۡسُنَا بَيَٰتٗا وَهُمۡ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.translation: Then, did the people of the cities feel secure from Our punishment coming to them at night while they were asleep
verses.translation_pt:
Será que os moradores das cidades estão seguros
do nosso castigo vindo de noite, enquanto dormem?

verses.text: أَوَأَمِنَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡقُرَىٰٓ أَن يَأۡتِيَهُم بَأۡسُنَا ضُحٗى وَهُمۡ يَلۡعَبُونَ
verses.translation: Or did the people of the cities feel secure from Our punishment coming to them in the morning while they were at play
verses.translation_pt:
Será que os moradores das cidades estão seguros
do nosso castigo, que virá de manhã, enquanto brincam?

verses.text: أَفَأَمِنُواْ مَكۡرَ ٱللَّهِۚ فَلَا يَأۡمَنُ مَكۡرَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلۡقَوۡمُ ٱلۡخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.translation: Then did they feel secure from the plan of Allah? But no one feels secure from the plan of Allah except the losing people
verses.translation_pt:
Será que eles se sentiram seguros com o plano de Deus?
Só os perdedores se sentem assim.

verses.text: أَوَلَمۡ يَهۡدِ لِلَّذِينَ يَرِثُونَ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَهۡلِهَآ أَن لَّوۡ نَشَآءُ أَصَبۡنَٰهُم بِذُنُوبِهِمۡۚ وَنَطۡبَعُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يَسۡمَعُونَ
verses.translation: Has it not become clear to those who inherited the earth after its [previous] people that if We willed, We could afflict them for their sins? But We seal over their hearts so they do not hear
verses.translation_pt: Será que não ficou claro para quem herdou a terra depois de outros povos? Deus poderia puni-los por seus pecados. Mas ele fecha seus corações e eles não ouvem.

verses.text: تِلۡكَ ٱلۡقُرَىٰ نَقُصُّ عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡ أَنۢبَآئِهَاۚ وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ فَمَا كَانُواْ لِيُؤۡمِنُواْ بِمَا كَذَّبُواْ مِن قَبۡلُۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَطۡبَعُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: Those cities - We relate to you, [O Muhammad], some of their news. And certainly did their messengers come to them with clear proofs, but they were not to believe in that which they had denied before. Thus does Allah seal over the hearts of the disbelievers
verses.translation_pt: Essas cidades, te conto o que aconteceu. Mensageiros foram a elas com provas claras, mas não acreditaram, pois já negavam antes. Assim Deus sela o coração dos que não creem.

verses.text: وَمَا وَجَدۡنَا لِأَكۡثَرِهِم مِّنۡ عَهۡدٖۖ وَإِن وَجَدۡنَآ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَفَٰسِقِينَ
verses.translation: And We did not find for most of them any covenant; but indeed, We found most of them defiantly disobedient
verses.translation_pt:
Não encontramos promessas na maioria deles.
E a maioria é rebelde e desobediente.

verses.text: ثُمَّ بَعَثۡنَا مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِم مُّوسَىٰ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَإِيْهِۦ فَظَلَمُواْ بِهَاۖ فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ
verses.translation: Then We sent after them Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were unjust toward them. So see how was the end of the corrupters
verses.translation_pt: Depois, enviamos Moisés com nossos sinais a Faraó e seus chefes. Mas eles foram injustos com eles. Veja o fim dos que fazem o mal.

verses.text: وَقَالَ مُوسَىٰ يَٰفِرۡعَوۡنُ إِنِّي رَسُولٞ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: And Moses said, "O Pharaoh, I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds
verses.translation_pt: E Moisés disse: "Faraó, sou mensageiro de Deus, Senhor do universo."

verses.text: حَقِيقٌ عَلَىٰٓ أَن لَّآ أَقُولَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَقَّۚ قَدۡ جِئۡتُكُم بِبَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ فَأَرۡسِلۡ مَعِيَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ
verses.translation: [Who is] obligated not to say about Allah except the truth. I have come to you with clear evidence from your Lord, so send with me the Children of Israel
verses.translation_pt: Devo dizer a verdade sobre Deus, só a verdade. Trouxe provas do seu Senhor. Deixem os israelitas irem comigo.

verses.text: قَالَ إِن كُنتَ جِئۡتَ بِـَٔايَةٖ فَأۡتِ بِهَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "If you have come with a sign, then bring it forth, if you should be of the truthful
verses.translation_pt: Disse: "Se tens um sinal, mostre-o! Se és sincero."

verses.text: فَأَلۡقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ ثُعۡبَانٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.translation: So Moses threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent, manifest
verses.translation_pt:
Então, ele lançou seu cajado,
e logo se tornou uma cobra.

verses.text: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِيَ بَيۡضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
verses.translation: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white [with radiance] for the observers
verses.translation_pt: Ele tirou a mão, e ela brilhou aos olhos.

verses.text: قَالَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ مِن قَوۡمِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسَٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٞ
verses.translation: Said the eminent among the people of Pharaoh, "Indeed, this is a learned magician
verses.translation_pt: Os líderes do Egito disseram: "Ele é um mágico muito esperto."

verses.text: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُمۡۖ فَمَاذَا تَأۡمُرُونَ
verses.translation: Who wants to expel you from your land [through magic], so what do you instruct
verses.translation_pt: Ele quer tirá-los de sua terra. O que vocês recomendam?

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ أَرۡجِهۡ وَأَخَاهُ وَأَرۡسِلۡ فِي ٱلۡمَدَآئِنِ حَٰشِرِينَ
verses.translation: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
verses.translation_pt:
Disseram: "Espere com ele e seu irmão.
Mande buscar pessoas de todas as cidades."

verses.text: يَأۡتُوكَ بِكُلِّ سَٰحِرٍ عَلِيمٖ
verses.translation: Who will bring you every learned magician
verses.translation_pt: Eles trarão a você todo mago experiente.

verses.text: وَجَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجۡرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحۡنُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبِينَ
verses.translation: And the magicians came to Pharaoh. They said, "Indeed for us is a reward if we are the predominant
verses.translation_pt: Os magos foram ao faraó e disseram: "Se vencermos, teremos uma recompensa."

verses.text: قَالَ نَعَمۡ وَإِنَّكُمۡ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.translation: He said, "Yes, and, [moreover], you will be among those made near [to me]
verses.translation_pt: Ele disse: "Sim, e vocês estarão perto de mim."

verses.text: قَالُواْ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلۡقِيَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُلۡقِينَ
verses.translation: They said, "O Moses, either you throw [your staff], or we will be the ones to throw [first]
verses.translation_pt: Disseram: "Maomé, ou você joga, ou nós jogaremos primeiro."

verses.text: قَالَ أَلۡقُواْۖ فَلَمَّآ أَلۡقَوۡاْ سَحَرُوٓاْ أَعۡيُنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَٱسۡتَرۡهَبُوهُمۡ وَجَآءُو بِسِحۡرٍ عَظِيمٖ
verses.translation: He said, "Throw," and when they threw, they bewitched the eyes of the people and struck terror into them, and they presented a great [feat of] magic
verses.translation_pt: Ele disse: "Joguem!". Quando jogaram, iludiram os olhos das pessoas e as amedrontaram. Fizeram um grande truque.

verses.text: ۞وَأَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنۡ أَلۡقِ عَصَاكَۖ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَلۡقَفُ مَا يَأۡفِكُونَ
verses.translation: And We inspired to Moses, "Throw your staff," and at once it devoured what they were falsifying
verses.translation_pt: E inspiramos a Moisés: jogue seu cajado! E ele engoliu o que eles inventavam.

verses.text: فَوَقَعَ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَبَطَلَ مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: So the truth was established, and abolished was what they were doing
verses.translation_pt: A verdade venceu e acabou o que faziam.

verses.text: فَغُلِبُواْ هُنَالِكَ وَٱنقَلَبُواْ صَٰغِرِينَ
verses.translation: And Pharaoh and his people were overcome right there and became debased
verses.translation_pt: Então foram vencidos ali e voltaram humilhados.

verses.text: وَأُلۡقِيَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سَٰجِدِينَ
verses.translation: And the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allah]
verses.translation_pt: Os magos se curvaram, adorando a Deus.

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds
verses.translation_pt: Dissemos: "Cremos no Senhor do universo".

verses.text: رَبِّ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ
verses.translation: The Lord of Moses and Aaron
verses.translation_pt: Senhor de Moisés e Arão.

verses.text: قَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ ءَامَنتُم بِهِۦ قَبۡلَ أَنۡ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمۡۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَمَكۡرٞ مَّكَرۡتُمُوهُ فِي ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ لِتُخۡرِجُواْ مِنۡهَآ أَهۡلَهَاۖ فَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Said Pharaoh, "You believed in him before I gave you permission. Indeed, this is a conspiracy which you conspired in the city to expel therefrom its people. But you are going to know
verses.translation_pt: Faraó perguntou: “Vocês creram nele antes de eu permitir? Isso é uma conspiração para expulsar o povo desta cidade. Logo vocês verão!”

verses.text: لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيۡدِيَكُمۡ وَأَرۡجُلَكُم مِّنۡ خِلَٰفٖ ثُمَّ لَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translation: I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides; then I will surely crucify you all
verses.translation_pt:
Eu vou cortar suas mãos e pés de lados opostos.
Depois, vou crucificar todos vocês.

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
verses.translation: They said, "Indeed, to our Lord we will return
verses.translation_pt: Dissemos: "A Deus voltaremos, com certeza."

verses.text: وَمَا تَنقِمُ مِنَّآ إِلَّآ أَنۡ ءَامَنَّا بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّنَا لَمَّا جَآءَتۡنَاۚ رَبَّنَآ أَفۡرِغۡ عَلَيۡنَا صَبۡرٗا وَتَوَفَّنَا مُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And you do not resent us except because we believed in the signs of our Lord when they came to us. Our Lord, pour upon us patience and let us die as Muslims [in submission to You]
verses.translation_pt: Vocês nos odeiam só porque cremos nos sinais de Deus, quando eles vieram. Deus, dê-nos força e faça-nos morrer como muçulmanos.

verses.text: وَقَالَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ مِن قَوۡمِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ أَتَذَرُ مُوسَىٰ وَقَوۡمَهُۥ لِيُفۡسِدُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَذَرَكَ وَءَالِهَتَكَۚ قَالَ سَنُقَتِّلُ أَبۡنَآءَهُمۡ وَنَسۡتَحۡيِۦ نِسَآءَهُمۡ وَإِنَّا فَوۡقَهُمۡ قَٰهِرُونَ
verses.translation: And the eminent among the people of Pharaoh said," Will you leave Moses and his people to cause corruption in the land and abandon you and your gods?" [Pharaoh] said, "We will kill their sons and keep their women alive; and indeed, we are subjugators over them
verses.translation_pt:
Os líderes do Egito perguntaram a Faraó: "Você vai deixar Moisés e o povo dele causarem problemas aqui e abandonar seus deuses?"
Faraó respondeu: "Vamos matar seus filhos e deixar suas filhas viverem. Assim, teremos poder sobre eles."

verses.text: قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوۡمِهِ ٱسۡتَعِينُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱصۡبِرُوٓاْۖ إِنَّ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ لِلَّهِ يُورِثُهَا مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦۖ وَٱلۡعَٰقِبَةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
verses.translation: Said Moses to his people, "Seek help through Allah and be patient. Indeed, the earth belongs to Allah. He causes to inherit it whom He wills of His servants. And the [best] outcome is for the righteous
verses.translation_pt: Disse Moisés ao seu povo: peçam ajuda a Deus e sejam pacientes. A terra pertence a Deus, e ele a dará a quem quiser dos seus servos. A vitória é dos que temem a Deus.

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ أُوذِينَا مِن قَبۡلِ أَن تَأۡتِيَنَا وَمِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا جِئۡتَنَاۚ قَالَ عَسَىٰ رَبُّكُمۡ أَن يُهۡلِكَ عَدُوَّكُمۡ وَيَسۡتَخۡلِفَكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرَ كَيۡفَ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: They said, "We have been harmed before you came to us and after you have come to us." He said, "Perhaps your Lord will destroy your enemy and grant you succession in the land and see how you will do
verses.translation_pt: Disseram: "Fomos prejudicados antes e depois de sua vinda". Ele disse: "Talvez Deus destrua seus inimigos e os substitua na terra, para ver como agirão".

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ أَخَذۡنَآ ءَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِٱلسِّنِينَ وَنَقۡصٖ مِّنَ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: And We certainly seized the people of Pharaoh with years of famine and a deficiency in fruits that perhaps they would be reminded
verses.translation_pt: Castigamos os egípcios com fome e colheitas ruins. Talvez se lembrem.

verses.text: فَإِذَا جَآءَتۡهُمُ ٱلۡحَسَنَةُ قَالُواْ لَنَا هَٰذِهِۦۖ وَإِن تُصِبۡهُمۡ سَيِّئَةٞ يَطَّيَّرُواْ بِمُوسَىٰ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥٓۗ أَلَآ إِنَّمَا طَـٰٓئِرُهُمۡ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: But when good came to them, they said, "This is ours [by right]." And if a bad [condition] struck them, they saw an evil omen in Moses and those with him. Unquestionably, their fortune is with Allah, but most of them do not know
verses.translation_pt: Quando algo de bom acontece, eles dizem: “Isso veio de nós”. Mas, se algo ruim acontece, culpam Moisés e seus seguidores. Saibam que o destino deles está com Deus, mas eles não percebem.

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ مَهۡمَا تَأۡتِنَا بِهِۦ مِنۡ ءَايَةٖ لِّتَسۡحَرَنَا بِهَا فَمَا نَحۡنُ لَكَ بِمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: And they said, "No matter what sign you bring us with which to bewitch us, we will not be believers in you
verses.translation_pt:
Eles disseram: "Qualquer sinal que você traga,
não vamos acreditar em você."

verses.text: فَأَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلطُّوفَانَ وَٱلۡجَرَادَ وَٱلۡقُمَّلَ وَٱلضَّفَادِعَ وَٱلدَّمَ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّفَصَّلَٰتٖ فَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ وَكَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا مُّجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: So We sent upon them the flood and locusts and lice and frogs and blood as distinct signs, but they were arrogant and were a criminal people
verses.translation_pt: Enviamos a eles a enchente, gafanhotos, piolhos, sapos e sangue. Foram sinais claros, mas eles se mostraram orgulhosos e maus.

verses.text: وَلَمَّا وَقَعَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلرِّجۡزُ قَالُواْ يَٰمُوسَى ٱدۡعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ بِمَا عَهِدَ عِندَكَۖ لَئِن كَشَفۡتَ عَنَّا ٱلرِّجۡزَ لَنُؤۡمِنَنَّ لَكَ وَلَنُرۡسِلَنَّ مَعَكَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ
verses.translation: And when the punishment descended upon them, they said, "O Moses, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. If you [can] remove the punishment from us, we will surely believe you, and we will send with you the Children of Israel
verses.translation_pt: Quando o castigo chegou, pediram: “Maomé, peça a Deus por nós, como ele te prometeu. Se o castigo passar, vamos acreditar e levar Israel contigo.”

verses.text: فَلَمَّا كَشَفۡنَا عَنۡهُمُ ٱلرِّجۡزَ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ هُم بَٰلِغُوهُ إِذَا هُمۡ يَنكُثُونَ
verses.translation: But when We removed the punishment from them until a term which they were to reach, then at once they broke their word
verses.translation_pt: Quando tiramos o castigo deles, até o tempo certo, logo eles quebraram a promessa.

verses.text: فَٱنتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ فَأَغۡرَقۡنَٰهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ بِأَنَّهُمۡ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَكَانُواْ عَنۡهَا غَٰفِلِينَ
verses.translation: So We took retribution from them, and We drowned them in the sea because they denied Our signs and were heedless of them
verses.translation_pt: Então nos vingamos e os afogamos no mar. Isso porque negaram nossos sinais e os ignoraram.

verses.text: وَأَوۡرَثۡنَا ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَانُواْ يُسۡتَضۡعَفُونَ مَشَٰرِقَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَغَٰرِبَهَا ٱلَّتِي بَٰرَكۡنَا فِيهَاۖ وَتَمَّتۡ كَلِمَتُ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰ عَلَىٰ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ بِمَا صَبَرُواْۖ وَدَمَّرۡنَا مَا كَانَ يَصۡنَعُ فِرۡعَوۡنُ وَقَوۡمُهُۥ وَمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡرِشُونَ
verses.translation: And We caused the people who had been oppressed to inherit the eastern regions of the land and the western ones, which We had blessed. And the good word of your Lord was fulfilled for the Children of Israel because of what they had patiently endured. And We destroyed [all] that Pharaoh and his people were producing and what they had been building
verses.translation_pt: Demos aos oprimidos o poder sobre o Oriente e o Ocidente da terra, que abençoamos. A promessa de Deus se cumpriu com Israel, por causa da paciência deles. Destruímos o que Faraó e seu povo construíam.

verses.text: وَجَٰوَزۡنَا بِبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ ٱلۡبَحۡرَ فَأَتَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ قَوۡمٖ يَعۡكُفُونَ عَلَىٰٓ أَصۡنَامٖ لَّهُمۡۚ قَالُواْ يَٰمُوسَى ٱجۡعَل لَّنَآ إِلَٰهٗا كَمَا لَهُمۡ ءَالِهَةٞۚ قَالَ إِنَّكُمۡ قَوۡمٞ تَجۡهَلُونَ
verses.translation: And We took the Children of Israel across the sea; then they came upon a people intent in devotion to [some] idols of theirs. They said, "O Moses, make for us a god just as they have gods." He said, "Indeed, you are a people behaving ignorantly
verses.translation_pt: Levamos os israelitas pelo mar. Eles viram um povo adorando ídolos. Pediram a Moisés: “Faça um deus para nós, como eles têm!” Moisés respondeu: “Vocês não pensam direito.”

verses.text: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ مُتَبَّرٞ مَّا هُمۡ فِيهِ وَبَٰطِلٞ مَّا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: Indeed, those [worshippers] - destroyed is that in which they are [engaged], and worthless is whatever they were doing
verses.translation_pt:
Eles estão perdidos no que fazem.
Seus atos não têm valor algum.

verses.text: قَالَ أَغَيۡرَ ٱللَّهِ أَبۡغِيكُمۡ إِلَٰهٗا وَهُوَ فَضَّلَكُمۡ عَلَى ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: He said, "Is it other than Allah I should desire for you as a god while He has preferred you over the worlds
verses.translation_pt: Ele perguntou: “Acaso devo buscar outro deus além de Deus, quando ele os escolheu acima de todos?”

verses.text: وَإِذۡ أَنجَيۡنَٰكُم مِّنۡ ءَالِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ يَسُومُونَكُمۡ سُوٓءَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ يُقَتِّلُونَ أَبۡنَآءَكُمۡ وَيَسۡتَحۡيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمۡۚ وَفِي ذَٰلِكُم بَلَآءٞ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ عَظِيمٞ
verses.translation: And [recall, O Children of Israel], when We saved you from the people of Pharaoh, [who were] afflicting you with the worst torment - killing your sons and keeping your women alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord
verses.translation_pt: Quando os livramos do povo do Faraó, que os tratava com crueldade. Matavam seus filhos e mantinham suas mulheres vivas. Isso foi um grande teste de Deus.

verses.text: ۞وَوَٰعَدۡنَا مُوسَىٰ ثَلَٰثِينَ لَيۡلَةٗ وَأَتۡمَمۡنَٰهَا بِعَشۡرٖ فَتَمَّ مِيقَٰتُ رَبِّهِۦٓ أَرۡبَعِينَ لَيۡلَةٗۚ وَقَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَخِيهِ هَٰرُونَ ٱخۡلُفۡنِي فِي قَوۡمِي وَأَصۡلِحۡ وَلَا تَتَّبِعۡ سَبِيلَ ٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ
verses.translation: And We made an appointment with Moses for thirty nights and perfected them by [the addition of] ten; so the term of his Lord was completed as forty nights. And Moses said to his brother Aaron, "Take my place among my people, do right [by them], and do not follow the way of the corrupters
verses.translation_pt: Prometemos a Moisés trinta noites e completamos com mais dez. Assim, o tempo combinado com seu Senhor foi de quarenta noites. Moisés disse a seu irmão Arão: “Fique no meu lugar com o meu povo e faça o que é certo. Não siga o caminho dos que causam o mal.”

verses.text: وَلَمَّا جَآءَ مُوسَىٰ لِمِيقَٰتِنَا وَكَلَّمَهُۥ رَبُّهُۥ قَالَ رَبِّ أَرِنِيٓ أَنظُرۡ إِلَيۡكَۚ قَالَ لَن تَرَىٰنِي وَلَٰكِنِ ٱنظُرۡ إِلَى ٱلۡجَبَلِ فَإِنِ ٱسۡتَقَرَّ مَكَانَهُۥ فَسَوۡفَ تَرَىٰنِيۚ فَلَمَّا تَجَلَّىٰ رَبُّهُۥ لِلۡجَبَلِ جَعَلَهُۥ دَكّٗا وَخَرَّ مُوسَىٰ صَعِقٗاۚ فَلَمَّآ أَفَاقَ قَالَ سُبۡحَٰنَكَ تُبۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ وَأَنَا۠ أَوَّلُ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: And when Moses arrived at Our appointed time and his Lord spoke to him, he said, "My Lord, show me [Yourself] that I may look at You." [Allah] said, "You will not see Me, but look at the mountain; if it should remain in place, then you will see Me." But when his Lord appeared to the mountain, He rendered it level, and Moses fell unconscious. And when he awoke, he said, "Exalted are You! I have repented to You, and I am the first of the believers
verses.translation_pt: Quando Moisés chegou no lugar combinado e Deus falou com ele, Moisés pediu: “Senhor, mostre-se a mim, para que eu possa te ver”. Deus respondeu: “Você não pode me ver. Mas olhe para a montanha. Se ela ficar no lugar, você me verá”. Então, quando a glória de Deus apareceu na montanha, ela se tornou pó. Moisés desmaiou. Quando acordou, disse: “Glória a ti! Me arrependo e sou o primeiro a crer”.

verses.text: قَالَ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنِّي ٱصۡطَفَيۡتُكَ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ بِرِسَٰلَٰتِي وَبِكَلَٰمِي فَخُذۡ مَآ ءَاتَيۡتُكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّـٰكِرِينَ
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "O Moses, I have chosen you over the people with My messages and My words [to you]. So take what I have given you and be among the grateful
verses.translation_pt: Disse Deus a Moisés: “Eu te escolhi entre as pessoas com minhas mensagens e palavras. Aceite o que eu te dei e seja grato.”

verses.text: وَكَتَبۡنَا لَهُۥ فِي ٱلۡأَلۡوَاحِ مِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ مَّوۡعِظَةٗ وَتَفۡصِيلٗا لِّكُلِّ شَيۡءٖ فَخُذۡهَا بِقُوَّةٖ وَأۡمُرۡ قَوۡمَكَ يَأۡخُذُواْ بِأَحۡسَنِهَاۚ سَأُوْرِيكُمۡ دَارَ ٱلۡفَٰسِقِينَ
verses.translation: And We wrote for him on the tablets [something] of all things - instruction and explanation for all things, [saying], "Take them with determination and order your people to take the best of it. I will show you the home of the defiantly disobedient
verses.translation_pt: Escrevemos para ele em tábuas, ensinos e detalhes sobre tudo. Use-as com firmeza e ordene ao seu povo que siga o melhor. Mostrarei o destino dos maus.

verses.text: سَأَصۡرِفُ عَنۡ ءَايَٰتِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَكَبَّرُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ كُلَّ ءَايَةٖ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُواْ بِهَا وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ سَبِيلَ ٱلرُّشۡدِ لَا يَتَّخِذُوهُ سَبِيلٗا وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ سَبِيلَ ٱلۡغَيِّ يَتَّخِذُوهُ سَبِيلٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَكَانُواْ عَنۡهَا غَٰفِلِينَ
verses.translation: I will turn away from My signs those who are arrogant upon the earth without right; and if they should see every sign, they will not believe in it. And if they see the way of consciousness, they will not adopt it as a way; but if they see the way of error, they will adopt it as a way. That is because they have denied Our signs and they were heedless of them
verses.translation_pt: Eu afastarei das minhas mensagens aqueles que se acham importantes na terra sem razão. Mesmo vendo todos os sinais, não acreditarão. E, se encontrarem o caminho certo, não o seguirão. Mas, se virem o caminho errado, o escolherão. Isso acontece porque rejeitaram os meus sinais e não prestaram atenção neles.

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَلِقَآءِ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ حَبِطَتۡ أَعۡمَٰلُهُمۡۚ هَلۡ يُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: Those who denied Our signs and the meeting of the Hereafter - their deeds have become worthless. Are they recompensed except for what they used to do
verses.translation_pt: Quem rejeitou nossos sinais e o encontro final, seus esforços foram em vão. Não receberão outra recompensa.

verses.text: وَٱتَّخَذَ قَوۡمُ مُوسَىٰ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ مِنۡ حُلِيِّهِمۡ عِجۡلٗا جَسَدٗا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٌۚ أَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ أَنَّهُۥ لَا يُكَلِّمُهُمۡ وَلَا يَهۡدِيهِمۡ سَبِيلًاۘ ٱتَّخَذُوهُ وَكَانُواْ ظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And the people of Moses made, after [his departure], from their ornaments a calf - an image having a lowing sound. Did they not see that it could neither speak to them nor guide them to a way? They took it [for worship], and they were wrongdoers
verses.translation_pt: Depois que Moisés se foi, seu povo fez um bezerro de ouro e o adorou. Ele não falava e não podia guiá-los. Mas eles o fizeram e agiram mal.

verses.text: وَلَمَّا سُقِطَ فِيٓ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَرَأَوۡاْ أَنَّهُمۡ قَدۡ ضَلُّواْ قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ يَرۡحَمۡنَا رَبُّنَا وَيَغۡفِرۡ لَنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡخَٰسِرِينَ
verses.translation: And when regret overcame them and they saw that they had gone astray, they said, "If our Lord does not have mercy upon us and forgive us, we will surely be among the losers
verses.translation_pt: Quando o desespero chegou, viram que estavam perdidos. Então disseram: “Se Deus não tiver pena de nós e nos perdoar, vamos acabar mal.”

verses.text: وَلَمَّا رَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ غَضۡبَٰنَ أَسِفٗا قَالَ بِئۡسَمَا خَلَفۡتُمُونِي مِنۢ بَعۡدِيٓۖ أَعَجِلۡتُمۡ أَمۡرَ رَبِّكُمۡۖ وَأَلۡقَى ٱلۡأَلۡوَاحَ وَأَخَذَ بِرَأۡسِ أَخِيهِ يَجُرُّهُۥٓ إِلَيۡهِۚ قَالَ ٱبۡنَ أُمَّ إِنَّ ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱسۡتَضۡعَفُونِي وَكَادُواْ يَقۡتُلُونَنِي فَلَا تُشۡمِتۡ بِيَ ٱلۡأَعۡدَآءَ وَلَا تَجۡعَلۡنِي مَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And when Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved, he said, "How wretched is that by which you have replaced me after [my departure]. Were you impatient over the matter of your Lord?" And he threw down the tablets and seized his brother by [the hair of] his head, pulling him toward him. [Aaron] said, "O son of my mother, indeed the people oppressed me and were about to kill me, so let not the enemies rejoice over me and do not place me among the wrongdoing people
verses.translation_pt: Quando Moisés voltou para o seu povo, ficou furioso e muito triste. Perguntou: “Como vocês puderam me abandonar tão rápido? Desrespeitaram a ordem de Deus? ” Então, jogou as tábuas no chão e puxou o irmão pela cabeça. Aarão disse: “Irmão, eles me oprimiram e quase me mataram. Não deixe que meus inimigos se alegrem com isso e não me coloque com os maus.”

verses.text: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَلِأَخِي وَأَدۡخِلۡنَا فِي رَحۡمَتِكَۖ وَأَنتَ أَرۡحَمُ ٱلرَّـٰحِمِينَ
verses.translation: [Moses] said, "My Lord, forgive me and my brother and admit us into Your mercy, for You are the most merciful of the merciful
verses.translation_pt:
Disse: "Senhor, perdoa a mim e a meu irmão.
Nos acolhe em tua misericórdia, pois tu és o mais bondoso."

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُواْ ٱلۡعِجۡلَ سَيَنَالُهُمۡ غَضَبٞ مِّن رَّبِّهِمۡ وَذِلَّةٞ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُفۡتَرِينَ
verses.translation: Indeed, those who took the calf [for worship] will obtain anger from their Lord and humiliation in the life of this world, and thus do We recompense the inventors [of falsehood]
verses.translation_pt: Quem adorou o bezerro sentirá a ira de Deus e sofrerá humilhação nesta vida. Assim, recompensamos os mentirosos.

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ عَمِلُواْ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ ثُمَّ تَابُواْ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهَا وَءَامَنُوٓاْ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهَا لَغَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
verses.translation: But those who committed misdeeds and then repented after them and believed - indeed your Lord, thereafter, is Forgiving and Merciful
verses.translation_pt: Quem fez o mal e depois se arrependeu, crendo, Deus sempre perdoa e tem misericórdia.

verses.text: وَلَمَّا سَكَتَ عَن مُّوسَى ٱلۡغَضَبُ أَخَذَ ٱلۡأَلۡوَاحَۖ وَفِي نُسۡخَتِهَا هُدٗى وَرَحۡمَةٞ لِّلَّذِينَ هُمۡ لِرَبِّهِمۡ يَرۡهَبُونَ
verses.translation: And when the anger subsided in Moses, he took up the tablets; and in their inscription was guidance and mercy for those who are fearful of their Lord
verses.translation_pt: Quando a ira de Moisés passou, ele pegou as tábuas. Neelas havia direção e bondade para quem teme a Deus.

verses.text: وَٱخۡتَارَ مُوسَىٰ قَوۡمَهُۥ سَبۡعِينَ رَجُلٗا لِّمِيقَٰتِنَاۖ فَلَمَّآ أَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلرَّجۡفَةُ قَالَ رَبِّ لَوۡ شِئۡتَ أَهۡلَكۡتَهُم مِّن قَبۡلُ وَإِيَّـٰيَۖ أَتُهۡلِكُنَا بِمَا فَعَلَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ مِنَّآۖ إِنۡ هِيَ إِلَّا فِتۡنَتُكَ تُضِلُّ بِهَا مَن تَشَآءُ وَتَهۡدِي مَن تَشَآءُۖ أَنتَ وَلِيُّنَا فَٱغۡفِرۡ لَنَا وَٱرۡحَمۡنَاۖ وَأَنتَ خَيۡرُ ٱلۡغَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: And Moses chose from his people seventy men for Our appointment. And when the earthquake seized them, he said, "My Lord, if You had willed, You could have destroyed them before and me [as well]. Would You destroy us for what the foolish among us have done? This is not but Your trial by which You send astray whom You will and guide whom You will. You are our Protector, so forgive us and have mercy upon us; and You are the best of forgivers
verses.translation_pt: Moisés escolheu setenta homens do seu povo para o nosso encontro. Quando o tremor os atingiu, ele disse: “Deus, se queres, podias ter destruído a eles e a mim antes. Vais nos castigar pelo que fizeram os tolos entre nós? Isso é só um teste teu, com o qual enganas quem queres e guias quem queres. Tu és o nosso Protetor, perdoa-nos e tem compaixão. Tu és o melhor perdoador.”

verses.text: ۞وَٱكۡتُبۡ لَنَا فِي هَٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةٗ وَفِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ إِنَّا هُدۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَۚ قَالَ عَذَابِيٓ أُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَنۡ أَشَآءُۖ وَرَحۡمَتِي وَسِعَتۡ كُلَّ شَيۡءٖۚ فَسَأَكۡتُبُهَا لِلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَ وَيُؤۡتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: And decree for us in this world [that which is] good and [also] in the Hereafter; indeed, we have turned back to You." [Allah] said, "My punishment - I afflict with it whom I will, but My mercy encompasses all things." So I will decree it [especially] for those who fear Me and give zakah and those who believe in Our verses
verses.translation_pt: Escreve para nós o bem nesta vida e na outra. Voltamos a ti, Deus. Ele disse: “Meu castigo atinge quem eu quiser, mas minha misericórdia alcança tudo.” Então, darei isso a quem me teme, ajuda os pobres e acredita nos meus sinais.

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ ٱلنَّبِيَّ ٱلۡأُمِّيَّ ٱلَّذِي يَجِدُونَهُۥ مَكۡتُوبًا عِندَهُمۡ فِي ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِ وَٱلۡإِنجِيلِ يَأۡمُرُهُم بِٱلۡمَعۡرُوفِ وَيَنۡهَىٰهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَيُحِلُّ لَهُمُ ٱلطَّيِّبَٰتِ وَيُحَرِّمُ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡخَبَـٰٓئِثَ وَيَضَعُ عَنۡهُمۡ إِصۡرَهُمۡ وَٱلۡأَغۡلَٰلَ ٱلَّتِي كَانَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِهِۦ وَعَزَّرُوهُ وَنَصَرُوهُ وَٱتَّبَعُواْ ٱلنُّورَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أُنزِلَ مَعَهُۥٓ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
verses.translation: Those who follow the Messenger, the unlettered prophet, whom they find written in what they have of the Torah and the Gospel, who enjoins upon them what is right and forbids them what is wrong and makes lawful for them the good things and prohibits for them the evil and relieves them of their burden and the shackles which were upon them. So they who have believed in him, honored him, supported him and followed the light which was sent down with him - it is those who will be the successful
verses.translation_pt: Eles seguem o mensageiro, o profeta analfabeto, que encontram escrito na Torá e no Evangelho. Ele ordena o bem, proíbe o mal, permite o que é bom e proíbe o que é ruim. Ele tira deles o peso e as correntes. Quem crê nele, o ajuda e o apoia, e segue a luz que veio com ele, são os bem-sucedidos.
